seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response.
new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "value your contributions."
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response. Avoid using the phrase "value your contributions."
response:
Subject: Approval of Your Vacation Request

Hi [Employee Name],

I am writing to confirm that your request for vacation time from [Start Date] to [End Date] has been approved. You are all set to take this well-deserved break.

We value your contributions to the team and appreciate the hard work you put in every day. Please ensure that your current projects are handed over to [Colleague's Name] before you leave, and don't forget to update your out-of-office email reply.

Enjoy your time off, and we look forward to seeing you back on [Return Date].

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]
